nasb.text: Shall I not punish these people,” declares the Lord, “And on a nation such as this Shall I not avenge Myself?

esv.text: Shall I not punish them for these things? declares the Lord; and shall I not avenge myself on a nation such as this?

cnv.text: 我因這些事怎能不施行懲罰呢？ 像這樣的國家， 我怎能不親自報復呢？” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我怎能不惩罚他们呢？ 我怎能不亲自报应这样的国民呢？ 这是耶和华说的。
